name: sbcalc-web
description: Skyblock Calculator Web App - Frontend for calculating Minecraft Hypixel Skyblock item recipes and requirements

scripts.generate:recipes: cd ../../packages/neu-recipe-processor && pnpm run build && node dist/index.js && cp output/recipes_items.json ../../apps/web/data/recipes_items.json && cp output/merged_items.json ../../apps/web/data/items.json && cd - > /dev/null
scripts.generate:recipes:clean: cd ../../packages/neu-recipe-processor && pnpm run build:clean && cp output/recipes_items.json ../../apps/web/data/recipes_items.json && cp output/merged_items.json ../../apps/web/data/items.json && cd - > /dev/null
